sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_paths (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, path VARCHAR);
SELECT id, parse_dirpath(path, 'forward_slash') AS dir FROM test_paths WHERE 1 = (3 ^ 0);
SELECT id, parse_dirpath(CONCAT(path, 'extra'), 'forward_slash') AS dir FROM test_paths WHERE id > (2 ^ 2);
SELECT id, path FROM test_paths WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_paths WHERE id < 3) > (1 ^ 1) AND path IS NOT NULL;
SELECT (parse_dirpath(CONCAT('/base/path/', path), 'forward_slash') || ' has exponent: ' || CAST((id ^ 2) AS VARCHAR)) AS result FROM test_paths JOIN numbers ON (id = num);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT parse_dirpath(path, 'backslash') FROM test_paths WHERE id IS NOT NULL) AS valid_paths HAVING COUNT(*) > 0;
SELECT id, parse_dirpath(path, 'both_slash') AS dir FROM test_paths WHERE dir IS NOT NULL AND dir NOT LIKE '%empty%';
SELECT id, parse_dirpath(path, 'forward_slash') AS dir FROM test_paths WHERE id IN (SELECT num FROM numbers WHERE num IS NOT NULL HAVING COUNT(*) < (3 ^ 1));
ALTER TABLE test_paths ADD COLUMN description VARCHAR;
UPDATE test_paths SET description = 'This is a test path' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, path, description FROM test_paths WHERE LENGTH(path) = 0 OR description IS NULL;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_paths AS SELECT parse_dirpath(path, 'forward_slash') AS dir FROM test_paths WHERE id IS NOT NULL;
